Properties.Description: WebSocket API for dental clinic chatbot
Properties.Name: chatbot-websocket-api

Properties.Description: REST API for managing chatbot clinic data
Properties.Name: chatbot-rest-api

Properties.Description: REST API for managing chatbot clinic data

Properties.AlarmDescription: Alert when websocket-connect Lambda has errors
Alert when websocket-connect Lambda is throttled
Alert when websocket-connect Lambda p99 duration exceeds 24000ms (~80% of timeout)
Alert when websocket-disconnect Lambda has errors
Alert when websocket-disconnect Lambda is throttled
Alert when websocket-disconnect Lambda p99 duration exceeds 24000ms (~80% of timeout)
Alert when websocket-message Lambda has errors
Alert when websocket-message Lambda is throttled
Alert when websocket-message Lambda p99 duration exceeds 240000ms (~80% of timeout)
Alert when chat-history Lambda has errors
Alert when chat-history Lambda is throttled
Alert when chat-history Lambda p99 duration exceeds 24000ms (~80% of timeout)

WebSocketApiEndpoint.Description: Default WebSocket API endpoint for chatbot

WebSocketCustomDomainEndpoint.Description: Custom domain WebSocket API endpoint for chatbot

WebSocketDomainName.Description: WebSocket custom domain name for cross-stack API mappings

WebSocketRegionalDomainName.Description: Regional domain name for WebSocket custom domain

WebSocketRegionalHostedZoneId.Description: Regional hosted zone ID for WebSocket custom domain

RestApiEndpoint.Description: Default REST API endpoint for clinic data management

RestCustomDomainEndpoint.Description: Custom domain REST API endpoint for chatbot data management

ImportedClinicHoursTableName.Description: Imported Clinic Hours DynamoDB table name

ImportedClinicPricingTableName.Description: Imported Clinic Pricing DynamoDB table name

ImportedClinicInsuranceTableName.Description: Imported Clinic Insurance DynamoDB table name

BootstrapVersion.Description: Version of the CDK Bootstrap resources in this environment, automatically retrieved from SSM Parameter Store. [cdk:skip]

Assertions.AssertDescription: CDK bootstrap stack version 6 required. Please run 'cdk bootstrap' with a recent version of the CDK CLI.
